title: phyllanthus quintuplinervis var. quintuplinervis
intro: Phyllanthus quintuplinervis var. quintuplinervis, also known as Pusang, is a plant species belonging to the Euphorbiaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and hepatoprotective effects. The health benefits of Phyllanthus quintuplinervis var. quintuplinervis include the treatment of fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to protect against liver damage and oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by decocting the roots, stems, and leaves, which can be consumed as a tea or used as a topical application for skin conditions.
